mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, a.id AS accountId, a.account_name AS accountName, u.nickname AS nickname, u.email AS email FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_account a ON a.user_id = u.id AND a.status = 1 AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{_parameter} AND u.status = 1 AND u.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY a.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS userId, a.id AS accountId, a.account_name AS accountName, u.nickname AS nickname, u.email AS email FROM sys_account a INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = a.user_id AND u.status = 1 AND u.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{_parameter} AND a.status = 1 AND a.is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT u.id AS userId, a.id AS accountId, a.account_name AS accountName, u.nickname AS nickname, u.email AS email FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_account a ON a.user_id = u.id AND a.status = 1 AND a.is_deleted = 0 WHERE u.status = 1 AND u.is_deleted = 0 AND ( u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{_parameter}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{_parameter}, '%') OR a.account_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{_parameter}, '%') ) ORDER BY u.id ASC LIMIT 20
